articles.title: Police corporal held for punching partner’s alleged lover in Mandaluyong
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — A police corporal was taken into custody for allegedly punching his partner’s alleged lover in Mandaluyong City, the police said on Wednesday. The implicated cop surrendered to his station commander and was brought to the city police after crossing paths with his foe along Correctional Road in Barangay Addition Hills on Tuesday night, Mandaluyong police chief Col. Reynan Patam said in a briefing in Camp Crame. “The suspect saw the victim there and yelled, ‘So, you’re here!’ He punched him. The victim ran toward his house, but the suspect followed him. When the suspect caught up with [...]... Keep on reading: Police corporal held for punching partner’s alleged lover in Mandaluyong

articles.title: Police sergeant held for alleged lascivious acts vs minor in Malabon
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — A police sergeant was arrested for an alleged lascivious act against a 14-year-old girl in Malabon City, the police said on Wednesday. The alleged incident took place along Salmon Street in Barangay Longos on Tuesday night, according to Malabon police chief Col. Allan Umipig in a press briefing in Camp Crame. “The police officer was drunk and touched the young girl’s private parts from behind,” Umipig said, speaking in Filipino. READ: PNP axes 7 cops in missing Pogo raid cash case He explained that, after the incident, the victim had returned home and reported it to her [...]... Keep on reading: Police sergeant held for alleged lascivious acts vs minor in Malabon

articles.title: Napolcom: New raps for vlogger Francis Leo Marcos over unlicensed guards
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Criminal Investigation and Detection Group (CIDG) has filed additional criminal complaints against vlogger Norman Mangusin, more commonly known as Francis Leo Marcos, in connection with allegedly unlicensed security guards. In a statement on Tuesday night, the National Police Commission (Napolcom) said the CIDG had filed the complaints against Mangusin and nine others earlier that day before the Quezon City Prosecutor’s Office for violation of Republic Act No. 11917 or the Private Security Services Industry Act. READ: CIDG arrests vlogger Francis Leo Marcos – Napolcom “The complaint... involves the alleged practice of the private security profession without [...]... Keep on reading: Napolcom: New raps for vlogger Francis Leo Marcos over unlicensed guards

articles.title: Palace releases video of dela Rosa, Padilla leaving Senate premises
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Palace on Wednesday shared footage of Senators Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa and Robin Padilla leaving the Senate premises together before dawn last Thursday, May 14, hours after a shooting incident. Dela Rosa was seen wearing a dark-colored jacket and a cap in the video, while Padilla wore a light-colored long-sleeved shirt. READ: PNP: Dela Rosa, Padilla seen leaving Senate hours after shooting One of the clips showed Padilla first entering the Senate parking lot, followed by a woman also wearing a cap, and then dela Rosa.
